itineraries.name: The Classic 10-Day Road Trip
itineraries.summary: Anchorage → Kenai Fjords → Denali → Fairbanks. The three things everyone comes for, at a humane pace.
itineraries.why: Hits a tidewater-glacier cruise, the Kenai, and Denali without backtracking or bush flights.
attractions: Kenai Fjords National Park Day Cruise
University of Alaska Museum of the North

itineraries.name: 7-Day Kenai + Anchorage
itineraries.who: short on time, want glaciers + wildlife
itineraries.summary: Stay south of Anchorage: fjords, glaciers, halibut, and the Homer Spit. Minimal driving, maximum coast.
itineraries.why: Everything is a day trip from Seward or Homer — no long transit days.
attractions: Kenai Fjords National Park Day Cruise

itineraries.name: 14-Day Ultimate Summer
itineraries.who: want the whole picture in one trip
itineraries.summary: The classic loop plus Wrangell-St. Elias, Valdez over Thompson Pass, and a day of bears at Brooks Falls.
itineraries.why: Adds the biggest national park in the country and a bear-viewing fly-in to the standard circuit.
attractions: Kenai Fjords National Park Day Cruise
University of Alaska Museum of the North

itineraries.name: 5-Day Winter Aurora
itineraries.summary: Fairbanks base camp: soak at Chena under the aurora, mush dogs, ride the winter train, chase clear skies.
itineraries.why: Fairbanks sits under the auroral oval and stays clear more nights than the coast.
attractions: University of Alaska Museum of the North

itineraries.name: 7-Day Inside Passage
itineraries.who: want Southeast without a cruise ship
itineraries.summary: Ride the state ferry between Ketchikan, Sitka, Juneau and Skagway — totems, whales, the icefield, the gold-rush railroad.
itineraries.why: The AMHS ferry lets you do the Inside Passage independently and cheaply, one town at a time.
attractions: Glacier Bay National Park - Bartlett Cove

itineraries.name: 10-Day Bears & Bush Planes
itineraries.summary: Brooks Falls, Silver Salmon Creek, and Kodiak — the three great brown-bear stages, reached by float plane.
itineraries.why: July and September are the salmon-run peaks when the bears line up at the falls.
attractions: Kodiak National Wildlife Refuge Visitor Center

itineraries.name: 8-Day Wrangell-St. Elias & Valdez
itineraries.summary: The empty side of Alaska: Matanuska Glacier, the McCarthy Road, Kennecott's copper ruins, and Valdez over Thompson Pass.
itineraries.why: The biggest park in the US, almost no people, and the most dramatic paved pass in the state.

itineraries.name: 6-Day Budget & Camping
itineraries.summary: Free glaciers, state-park campgrounds, and one splurge cruise. Sleep in the car or a tent, skip the tour buses.
itineraries.why: Exit Glacier, Portage, and Hatcher Pass are free; camping beats $250 hotel nights.
attractions: Portage Glacier & Begich, Boggs Visitor Center
Kenai Fjords National Park Day Cruise
